creator: tim@bsdunix.cx
text:
on my turtle beach tropez plus, i am able to play once.  e.g. if i play 
one mp3 with xmms, hit stop, and hit play again, it cant send audio to 
the device anymore and just locks up, it stays like this until i reboot.

this card has worked fine with the old pcm driver ever since it came 
out, and broke in -current around the middle of december.  ive seen people
post to the -current list with similar problems also.

How-To-Repeat: try to send audio to /dev/dsp
